text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What's the matter, Fukukitaru? We just
wanted to wish you a—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
P-p-please, no more! Sorry, but... I really must ask
you to stop!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You see, today's... just been such a happy day,
and if you two were to wish me a happy birthday
on top of that... that amount of happiness, i-it
would...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It would trigger a reversal of fortune! Who knows
what manner of calamities would await me
tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday... We can't just ignore your
special day, so you'll have to deal with it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I mean, even if misfortune comes your way or
whatever... we can just face it together, can't we?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'm as happy as can be today!
